title: taraxacum gibbiferum
intro: Taraxacum gibbiferum, also known as the hunchbacked dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum gibbiferum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
